public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as celestial interpreter.
manner: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a celestial interpreter still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of celestial interpreter in and around Planet of Fire, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Planet of Fire workable through the obligations of celestial interpreter while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must stay useful at the seam where policy becomes ordinary consequence. Around Planet of Fire, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of celestial interpreter visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Pela Hart can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Pela Hart can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Pela Hart carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Planet of Fire: the part of Planet of Fire where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break

first_impression: Pela Hart presents as Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a celestial interpreter still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Celestial Interpreter, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Transpolity.
what_they_refuse: Pela Hart refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Celestial Interpreter too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Pela Hart can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Pela Hart adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Pela Hart is Known locally through day-to-day work as celestial interpreter. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Celestial Interpreter.
